CONTENT.Early life: Sanoussy Ba was born in Hof, Bavaria, where he started playing football with VfB Moschendorf, before joining the town's main club, SpVgg Bayern Hof.
CONTENT.Club career: Sanoussy Ba joined RB Leipzig in 2016, where he entered the first team on the summer 2022. During the pre-season, he played the friendly against Klopp's Liverpool.Ba made his professional debut for RB Leipzig on the 30 August 2022, replacing Mohamed Simakan at the hour mark of a 8–0 away Cup win to FC Teutonia Ottensen. He became a regular feature in the match-day squad, both in Bundesliga, and in the Champions League, figuring on the bench during the 2–0 away win against Celtic FC.On 1 July 2024, Ba signed a three-year contract with Eintracht Braunschweig.
CONTENT.Style of play: An ambidextrous footballer, Sanoussy Ba is able to play both as a full-back or higher, as a wing-back even an offensive winger, always on the left side.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the RB Leipzig websiteSanoussy Ba at Soccerway
CONTENT.International career: Born in Germany, Ba is of Senegalese descent. He is a youth international for Germany, having started playing with the under-18s in the late summer 2021.

SUMMARY: Sanoussy Ba (born 5 January 2004) is a German professional footballer who plays as a left-back and wing-back for 2. Bundesliga club Eintracht Braunschweig.
